about.title: ABOUT SOIL VILLAGE
about.subtitle: The Wilderness Brand
about.description1: Soil Village represents the absolute pinnacle of premium outdoor mountain glamping retreats. Secluded within the spectacular pine borders of Solang Valley, Manali, our camp base is an oasis designed to let you escape the chaotic speeds of modern city life.
about.description2: We combine rugged alpine exploration trails, scenic mountain summits, and winding pristine rivers with cozy campfire logs, warm tea servings, comfortable tents, and starry night sky gazing to carve unforgettable memories.

owner.name: Renush
owner.title: MEET
owner.subtitle: The Owner
owner.quote: A synergy of survival expertise and premium vision. Renush founded this platform to bridge the gap between untamed wilderness and ultra-premium comfort.

items.title: Trail Refreshments
items.desc: Fresh forest fruits and energy chocolates for peak hiking trails.

items.title: Hot Base Camp Lunch
items.desc: Wholesome traditional mountain lunches cooked fresh at camp kitchens.

items.title: Evening Bonfire Tea & Snacks
items.desc: Cozy hot tea with local snacks served directly at the fire hearth.

items.title: Luxury Campfire Dinner
items.desc: Lavish warm dinners under lantern glow on alpine river shores.

items.title: Healthy Sunrise Breakfast
items.desc: Fresh sunrise breakfast brew with warm flatbreads and eggs.

tent.title: Luxury Geodesic Dome
tent.subtitle: 1N/2D Glamping Haven
tent.desc: Inspect our luxurious custom double-insulated Geodesic Dome. Featuring architectural reinforcement frame grids, transparent panoramic bay windows overlooking high pines, and central hearth climate integration.

compass.title: Mountain Navigation Core
compass.subtitle: Solar Brass Compass Dial
compass.desc: A premium high-fidelity solar brass compass system. Seamless fluid rotation and gold dial calibration, aligning perfectly to point true north relative to your mouse hover movements.

campfire.title: Wilderness Fire Hearth
campfire.subtitle: Rising Particle Glow Sparks
campfire.desc: A high-fidelity campfire particle hearth. Features cross-stacked pine logs inside a natural rock barrier circle, venting real-time flickering lights and warm ember sparkles floating upwards.

heart.title: Romantic Love Heart
heart.subtitle: Rose-Gold Metallic Core
heart.desc: A beautiful rose-gold extruded starlight heart. Designed for our exclusive Honeymoon package, surrounded by an elegant golden wireframe structural cage, orbiting custom diamonds, and cozy rising pink starry sparkles.

route.subtitle: Premium Expedition Route
route.title: SOLANG VALLEY BASE PATHWAY
route.desc: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking landscapes of the Himalayas. Our itineraries ensure every moment of your mountain escape is filled with beauty and premium comfort.

experience.subtitle: Sinu TESTING IT
experience.title: CAMPING SOLANG VALLEY
experience.quote: “Leave nothing but footprints, take nothing but memories.”

items.title: Trekking
items.desc: Embark on a magnificent 2-hour guided trek scaling past green forests, alpine brooks, and high elevation mountain flora surrounding the valley camp.
items.label: Solang High Peaks

items.title: Nature & Adventure
items.desc: Deep dive into pure unadulterated nature. Experience wild hiking ridges, evergreen coniferous woodlands, and local alpine mountain valleys.
items.label: Coniferous Ridge

items.title: Campfire
items.desc: Gather around a cozy open crackling campfire log fire. Bond, share tales of mountain climbs, and enjoy absolute wilderness relaxation under star skies.
items.label: Warm Sunset logs

items.title: Scenic Views
items.desc: Open your tent window to awe-inspiring layouts: snow peaks reaching into high blue sky clouds, crystalline pristine rivers, and mountain sunset glows.
items.label: Breathtaking Vibe

items.title: Relaxation
items.desc: Disconnect from city noise and unwind to the quiet rustling of leaves, bird songs, and running river waters. Restore your mental energy.
items.label: Serene Retreat

items.title: Photography
items.desc: Capture stunning compositions of alpine peaks, starry night heavens, bright bonfires, dynamic tents, and glowing sunbeams through pine needles.
items.label: Alpine Captures

showcase.subtitle: Interactive Showcase
showcase.title: Sinu RETREAT REST
showcase.quote: “Inspect our high-end glamping structures and adventure equipment in 3D WebGL”

solang.title: SOLANG VALLEY BASE PATHWAY
solang.desc: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking landscapes of the Himalayas. Our meticulously curated itineraries ensure every moment is filled with unparalleled luxury and comfort.
solang.path_desc: Your premium mountain camping journey begins with a smooth pickup from Delhi, driving northward past beautiful Himalayan ranges to Manali, before climbing into our base at Solang Valley.

spiti.title: SPITI VALLEY EXPEDITION LOOP
spiti.desc: Embark on a high-altitude road trip. Traverse ancient monasteries, stark landscapes, and rugged terrains in our premium SUVs designed for adventure.
spiti.path_desc: A magnificent high-altitude journey through the ancient Spiti Valley, passing through Shimla, Sangla, Kaza, Key Monastery, and breathtaking landscapes.

honeymoon.title: HONEYMOON ROMANTIC ESCAPE
honeymoon.desc: Celebrate your love in the serene luxury of the mountains. Enjoy private geodesic domes, candlelight dinners, and breathtaking sunsets tailored just for you.
honeymoon.path_desc: A magical mountain escape crafted for couples — private geodesic dome stays, candlelight dinners under starlight, and breathtaking views of snow-capped peaks.

family.title: MANALI FAMILY TOUR ROUTE
family.desc: Create unforgettable memories with your loved ones. Experience the best attractions, from the snowy slopes of Solang Valley to comfortable hotel stays.
family.path_desc: A perfectly paced family adventure through Manali's iconic spots — Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, Hadimba Temple, and cozy hotel stays designed for all ages.

footer.location:
Solang Valley, Manali,
Himachal Pradesh, India

items.title: MEET & GREET
items.desc: Meet and greet at Renush sh Homestay, Soyal. Assembly briefing and guide allocation.

items.title: 2 HOUR ALPINE TREK
items.desc: After that we proceed for a scenic 2 hour trek up the valley ridges passing pristine pine boundaries.

items.title: REACH CAMP & LUNCH
items.desc: Reach at camp, settle in premium glamping tents, and enjoy a hot wholesome mountain lunch.

items.title: RELAX & EVENING TEA
items.desc: After lunch, relax in the serene environment. Fresh herbal sunset tea served directly next to the river banks.

items.title: SNACKS & EXPLORATION
items.desc: Delicious warm starters served. Embark on a brief pine trail walk under rising twilight skies.

items.title: CAMPFIRE DINNER
items.desc: Warm fireside dinner and comfortable overnight stay at base camp under starlight.

items.title: EARLY TEA & SNACKS
items.desc: Early morning tea and snacks served at sunrise.

items.title: 1 HOUR SUMMIT HIKING
items.desc: Proceed for a 1 hour morning hiking session and return to base camp.

items.title: LUNCH AT CAMP
items.desc: Fresh, piping-hot lunch served at camp.

items.title: RETURN HOMESTAY
items.desc: After lunch, pack up and return safely to Renush sh Homestay with beautiful memories.
